entities.name: APHIS GOSSYPII
entities.description: The cotton aphid or melon aphid, a pest that threatens cotton production.

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: The host plant targeted by Aphis gossypii.

entities.name: SALIVARY PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins released by aphids during feeding to facilitate phloem sap consumption and modulate plant defenses.

entities.name: PHLOEM SAP
entities.description: The nutrient-rich plant fluid ingested by aphids.

entities.name: PLANT DEFENSE SYSTEMS
entities.description: The biological mechanisms of the host plant that are modulated by aphid salivary proteins.

entities.name: LC-MS/MS
entities.description: Liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry used to identify proteins in the salivary proteome.

entities.name: SALIVARY GLANDS
entities.description: The organs in Aphis gossypii where salivary proteins are produced.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL DIET
entities.description: A feeding condition used to collect aphid saliva for proteomic analysis.
